issueData.title: Remote Code Execution (Log4Shell)
issueData.description: log4j-core is vulnerable to remote code execution via JNDI lookups. The vulnerable code path is reachable from request-header logging in the checkout controller.

issueData.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
issueData.description: A crafted URL parameter lets the checkout service issue requests to arbitrary internal hosts. Reachable from the payment-callback endpoint, which forwards user-supplied callback URLs.
